overview.short: Kulpakji, also known as Kolanupaka Temple is a 2,000-year-old Śvetāmbara Jain temple in the village of Kolanupaka in Aler City, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district, Telangana, India.
overview.description: Kulpakji, also known as Kolanupaka Temple is a 2,000-year-old Śvetāmbara Jain temple in the village of Kolanupaka in Aler City, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district, Telangana, India. The temple houses three deities: one each of Lord Rishabhanatha, Lord Neminatha, and Lord Mahavira. The image of Lord Mahavir, carved of a green stone has been historically famous as "Manikyaswami" and Jivantasvami. The temple is about 80 km from Hyderabad on the Hyderabad-Warangal Highway NH 163.

topPlaces.name: Motakondur
topPlaces.description: Motakondur is a village & Mandal in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Motakondur mandal of Bhongir revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Alair
topPlaces.description: Alair is a town in Alair mandal of Bhongir revenue division in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a municipality and one of the constituencies in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district.

items.note: Kolanupaka is a village in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district, in the Indian state of Telangana.
Motakondur is a village & Mandal in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Motakondur mandal of Bhongir revenue division.

Alair is a town in Alair mandal of Bhongir revenue division in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a municipality and one of the constituencies in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kulpakji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kulpakji is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (64 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kulpakji?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kulpakji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kulpakji?
faq.a: Stays in Kulpakji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kulpakji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kolanupaka, Motakondur, Alair.
